channel.title: cli on Arsh Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in cli on Arsh Sharma

item.title: Creating A CLI In Golang
item.description: This is technically the first post on my blog so I’m pretty excited to write this one 😄 For the last few months, I’ve been working on depstat, which is a command-line tool to analyze dependencies, as part of my CNCF Internship. I’ve had a blast working on this especially because of the welcoming community. depstat is going to be used to evaluate dependency updates to Kubernetes and has been written in Go so I thought about sharing some stuff I learned :D
